title: stelis meganthera
intro: Stelis meganthera, also known as the orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The health benefits of Stelis meganthera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
